entry.name: cmdline
entry.label: Command line to draw the clock.
entry.default: cmd=$(date +"magick -size 300x110 canvas:black -draw 'rectangle 0,0 300,110' -pointsize 128 -fill '#FF2400' -draw 'text 0,104 \"%H\"' -fill white -pointsize 84 -draw 'text 116,104 \":%M\"' -fill '#FF2400' -stroke '#FF2400' -strokewidth 5 -draw 'line 220,0 220,110' -strokewidth 0 -stroke none -fill white -pointsize 32 -draw 'text 230, 30 \"%d\"' -draw 'text 230, 64 \"%b\"' -draw 'text 230, 100 \"%Y\"' \"$IMAGE_PATH\""); bash -c "$cmd"
